notes: Rest day. Excellent sleep — 10h1m from ~10PM to ~8AM. Only 2 meals. Kerala-style dinner.

sleep.notes: 10h1m. Onset ~10PM, woke ~8AM. Nearly consolidated: blocks ~10PM-12:30AM (Deep+Core), ~12:30AM-3AM (Core+REM+Deep), ~3:30AM-5:30AM (Core+REM), ~6AM-8AM (Core+REM). Multiple awakenings but returned to sleep each time. Best sleep quality logged this month.

meals.description: Hainanese chicken rice (extra chicken + 1 braised egg)
Pepper chicken (Kerala style) + 2 Kerala parata + 1 besan ladoo
